## Summary

**Root cause:** Commit `5292d87` changed the IDE package from `jetbrains.idea` to `jetbrains.idea-ultimate`. A recent nixpkgs update removed `idea-ultimate` as part of JetBrains' [unified IDEA distribution](https://blog.jetbrains.com/idea/2025/07/intellij-idea-unified-distribution-plan/), so it now `throw`s during evaluation — breaking both `build-nixos` (johnny-walker, classic-laddie) and the `check` (flake check) jobs.

**Fix:** Reverted to `jetbrains.idea`, which is now the unified distribution that *is* the Ultimate edition — satisfying both CI and the original commit's intent. Verified locally with `nix build --dry-run` on both failing configs before pushing.

The previously failing `build-nixos` and `check` jobs (and everything else) now pass on run `28301345079`.
